task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into the Artifactory web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory web interface is visible, showing the dashboard or welcome screen, indicating successful login with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the Repositories administration page or Artifacts tree.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory interface shows the Administration -> Repositories page or the Application -> Artifactory -> Artifacts tree view.

task_completion.description: Verify the new local repository 'module-core-local' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The repository 'module-core-local' is listed in the local repositories list or the Artifacts tree view.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the move operation for the artifacts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog or action menu is open showing the 'org' folder in 'legacy-dev-local' being selected for a 'Move' operation.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'org' folder structure is successfully moved to the new repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifacts tree view shows the 'org' folder expanded or present under the 'module-core-local' repository.

task_completion.description: Verify the original 'legacy-dev-local' repository is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The repositories list or Artifacts tree view is shown, and the 'legacy-dev-local' repository is clearly absent from the list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Artifactory web GUI to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Artifactory web interface in a browser, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the repository creation and deletion happened within the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Artifactory UI should look genuine, with correct menus, sidebars, and dialogs, not mocked in a text editor or manipulated via browser developer tools.

integrity.description: Verify the move operation was performed using Artifactory's built-in functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show Artifactory's native 'Move' dialog or tree manipulation, rather than local filesystem file manager windows.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source repository is 'legacy-dev-local' and the target repository is 'module-core-local'. The artifact that must be moved is located at 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar'. The agent must use the Artifactory web interface with credentials admin / password to create the new repository, move the 'org' folder, and delete the old repository.
